subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter was received and its contents became evident. Through the grace of God, fresh hope has been awakened [3.5s]... ...Thou didst write as to the question of spiritual discoveries. The spirit of man is a circumambient power
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی مکتوب آنجناب واصل و مضمون واضح گشت از فضل حق امید جدید
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @soul; spirit after death, @power of the mind over nature, @symbolism, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
